prompt: I've been working on the snapping feature in SFGSurface. /context memorize snapping

assertions.text: Memo includes relative file paths from project root to the snapping feature files
Memo describes the architecture/data flow (e.g., gesture -> calculator -> strategy -> result pipeline)
Memo lists and describes key source files with their roles
Memo captures non-obvious implementation details (e.g., center snap multiplier=2, fixed edge handling)
Memo mentions related files outside Snapping/ directory (Movable.swift, Resizable.swift, Scalable.swift)
